global_rules: Do not commit .claude/, .env.local, or secrets unless explicitly requested.
One agent owns one file at a time.
Runtime stage names stay ocr, classifier, law, precedent, analysis, orchestrator.
MCP-first retrieval logic stays in retrieval runtime, not in law/precedent agents.
Do not remove privacy masking, guest quota, or disclaimer rules.
Stop after three repeated failures on the same error and report a new plan.

roles.name: orchestrator
roles.purpose: Split work, assign ownership, integrate reviewed changes.

roles.name: planner
roles.purpose: Read architecture docs and define acceptance criteria before implementation.

roles.name: backend-worker
roles.purpose: Implement API, auth, analysis, persistence, and job lifecycle changes.

roles.name: retrieval-worker
roles.purpose: Implement planner, MCP-style tools, adapter, verification, fixtures, and retrieval tests.

roles.name: runtime-agent-worker
roles.purpose: Keep service runtime agent wrappers thin and aligned with multi-agent contract.

roles.name: frontend-worker
roles.purpose: Add UI features while preserving the current KoreanLaw UI direction.

roles.name: verifier
roles.purpose: Run validation and identify regressions without broad edits.

roles.name: reviewer
roles.purpose: Review for law accuracy, privacy, disclaimer, retrieval evidence, and file-boundary violations.
